channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Specialized Classes
item.description: 15 new classes that are the best in their fields by a large margin, with major but specific buffs

item.title: KCs Dragon Player!
item.description: Adds an anthropomorphic dragon player model to the game!

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: Textured Building
item.description: Adds a placement mode for easier texturing which places a random block from your hotbar

item.title: Custom Server Patch
item.description: A collection of tweaks for our private server.

item.title: Ore Whisper
item.description: Client-side particle hint toward nearby ore whenever your Prospecting Pick breaks a block.

item.title: Still Useful Stuff
item.description: Continuation of jakecool19's' Useful Stuff.

item.title: Sounds of Nature
item.description: Brings the world to life with realistic ambient wildlife audio that reacts to where you are.

item.title: MC Water Propegation
item.description: Makes it so that water propegates with only 2 source blocks (like in minecraft)

item.title: tweaks for pell's server
item.description: tweaks for pell's server

item.title: Prospector's Instinct
item.description: Subtle particle guidance that helps locate nearby ore while preserving the spirit of prospecting.

item.title: WOO Fantasy Additions
item.description: A mod focused on bringing the lore of the Oldwood into Vintage Story.

item.title: Level UP
item.description: Add new levels systems to your character

item.title: Bookkeeper
item.description: Know what you have. Know where it is.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Quartermaster
item.description: Run your whole base from one desk.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Inventory Transfer
item.description: Take your loot to a new world!

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks

item.title: Free The Horse
item.description: Big buff medieval semi-truck spawning wild in your area.

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: Glowest Worms
item.description: Glowest Worms is an expansion of glow worms and many surrounding mechanics.

item.title: Hotbar Restrictor
item.description: Restricts inventory to 4 hotbar and 2 backpack slots.

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Dragonia Server Mod Patch
item.description: Меняет генерацию железа и добавляет новый крафт льняного шпагата

item.title: No Indoor Fog Fix
item.description: Get rid of fog in your home! Increases fog distance from your camera when you are "indoors"

item.title: Entity Nametags
item.description: Adds a nametag item that can be used to name entities (elks, boats, etc.). + boat ownership
